data.title: LHT Holdings Extends Offer Validity for Asset Purchase
data.description:
The latest update is out from LHT Holdings Ltd ( (SG:BEI) ).

LHT Holdings Limited has received an unsolicited offer from Ms. Yap Mui Kee, the Managing Director of Pallets and Cases, to purchase the company’s assets and business. The validity period for this offer has been extended for a second time, now valid until October 19, 2025. The offer remains irrevocable but is not yet legally binding until accepted by the company. Shareholders are advised to exercise caution as there is no certainty that the offer will be accepted or that any definitive agreement will be reached.

More about LHT Holdings Ltd

LHT Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in Singapore, primarily involved in the manufacturing and distribution of pallets and cases.

Average Trading Volume: 262,023

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: S$51.65M

Learn more about BEI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Wah Sun Handbags Announces Nomination Committee Changes
data.description:
Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:2683) ) has provided an announcement.

Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Ltd. announced changes in its Nomination Committee, effective from September 19, 2025. These changes include the departure of Mr. Ma Hing Ming and the appointment of Ms. Ma Lan Chu as a committee member. This restructuring aligns with the updated Listing Rules and Corporate Governance Code, aiming to enhance board diversity and corporate governance practices.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2683) stock is a Buy with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Ltd. stock, see the HK:2683 Stock Forecast page.

More about Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Ltd.

Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily involved in the handbag industry. The company focuses on the design, manufacturing, and distribution of handbags, catering to various market segments.

Average Trading Volume: 606,281

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$351.4M

data.title: Cyviz AS Secures Strategic Defense Contract in Europe
data.description:
Cyviz AS ( (DE:8P9) ) has issued an announcement.

Cyviz AS has secured a significant contract worth USD 2.9 million from a European defense customer to develop a briefing center meeting stringent NATO security standards. This project underscores Cyviz’s expertise in providing secure, standardized platforms for government and defense sectors, enhancing its reputation in delivering critical technology solutions globally.

More about Cyviz AS

Cyviz AS is a global technology provider specializing in comprehensive conference and control rooms, command and experience centers. Since 1998, the company has been delivering next-generation collaboration rooms for global enterprises and governments, focusing on user-friendliness, decision support, security, and quality. Cyviz is listed on Euronext Growth on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 10,934

Current Market Cap: NOK472.3M

data.title: Peak Rare Earths Limited Announces Suspension from ASX Quotation Following Acquisition Approval
data.description:
The latest update is out from Peak Rare Earths Limited ( (AU:PEK) ).

Peak Rare Earths Limited announced the suspension of its securities from quotation on the ASX following the approval of a scheme of arrangement by the Supreme Court of New South Wales. This scheme allows Shenghe Resources (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. to acquire all issued shares of Peak, marking a significant shift in ownership and potentially impacting the company’s strategic direction and market presence.

More about Peak Rare Earths Limited

Peak Rare Earths Limited operates in the rare earth minerals industry, focusing on the exploration and development of rare earth resources. The company is primarily involved in the production and supply of rare earth elements, which are crucial for various high-tech and green energy applications.

Average Trading Volume: 1,902,069

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$185.1M

data.title: Numans Health Food Holdings Announces Auditor Change
data.description:
An announcement from Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited ( (HK:2530) ) is now available.

Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited has announced a change in its auditor, with Forvis Mazars CPA Limited resigning due to a disagreement over audit fees for the financial year ending December 31, 2025. The company has appointed Crowe (HK) CPA Limited as the new auditor, citing Crowe’s industry knowledge, technical competence, and independence as key factors for the decision. This change is not expected to impact the company’s annual audit or the release of its annual results.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2530) stock is a Buy with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited stock, see the HK:2530 Stock Forecast page.

More about Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited

Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited operates in the health food industry, focusing on the production and distribution of health-related food products. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is listed on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong.

Average Trading Volume: 489,881

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Speedy Global Holdings Schedules EGM to Appoint New Auditors
data.description:
Speedy Global Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:0540) ) has shared an announcement.

Speedy Global Holdings Limited has announced an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) scheduled for October 10, 2025, in Hong Kong. The primary agenda of this meeting is to consider and approve the appointment of SHINEWING (HK) CPA Limited as the company’s auditors until the next annual general meeting. This decision reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to maintaining transparency and sound financial practices, which could potentially impact its market perception and stakeholder confidence.

data.title: Fjord Defence Group ASA Gains Significant Voting Power for EGM
data.description:
Carbon Transition ASA ( (DE:S5B) ) has issued an announcement.

Fjord Defence Group ASA has received proxies for 60,186,868 shares, representing over 12% of its share capital, to be voted at an upcoming extraordinary general meeting. This development gives the chair of the board, Nina Skage, significant voting power, surpassing the 10% threshold outlined in the Norwegian Securities Trading Act, potentially impacting the company’s decision-making processes.

More about Carbon Transition ASA

data.title: Unith Ltd Issues Shares and Options to Directors and Advisors
data.description:
Crowd Media Holdings Limited ( (AU:UNT) ) has provided an update.

Unith Ltd has issued 14,285,704 fully paid ordinary shares to directors as part of a placement approved by shareholders. Additionally, the company issued unlisted options to directors and advisors, which are exercisable at specified prices and expiration dates. This move is part of Unith’s strategy to monetize its proprietary AI and digital human capabilities, potentially impacting its market positioning by enhancing its financial flexibility and stakeholder value.

More about Crowd Media Holdings Limited

Unith Ltd (ASX:UNT) is a technology company specializing in AI-driven digital human and conversation design solutions. The company focuses on designing, developing, and deploying interactive, AI-powered conversational agents that are realistic, multilingual, and scalable, enhancing customer engagement, education, and entertainment metrics for business clients. Unith also operates a business-to-consumer subscription division, leveraging its digital human technology to generate recurring revenue through subscription models.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$11.92M

data.title: Futaba Corporation to Transfer Fixed Assets from Chinese Subsidiary
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Futaba ( (JP:6986) ).

Futaba Corporation has announced the transfer of fixed assets from its Chinese subsidiary, Futaba Precision Mould (China) Co., Ltd., as part of the subsidiary’s dissolution process. The transfer, involving land use rights and buildings in Kunshan City, is expected to generate a capital gain of approximately 1.5 billion yen, which will be reflected in the company’s financial results for the fiscal year ending March 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:6986) stock is a Hold with a Yen605.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Futaba stock, see the JP:6986 Stock Forecast page.

More about Futaba

Futaba Corporation operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on precision moulds and related services. The company has a significant presence in China through its subsidiary, Futaba Precision Mould (China) Co., Ltd., which is fully owned by Futaba.

Average Trading Volume: 292,158

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen28.04B
